ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses acknowledge the guard's role and protocol, but could be more natural in tone to reflect urgency.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Maintains persona consistency with strictness; however lacks context relevance and a sense of immediacy in the response, which could be improved.
